title: [Bug report] Segmentation fault when using out-of-scope variable in slices

features.name: out_of_scope_loop_variable_in_slice
features.description: Code should include a for loop that references a loop variable declared in another for loop's scope, used in a slice operation with dynamic index
features.snippet:
for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) begin : loop
  for (int j = 0; j < 2; j++) begin : loop
    data[j] = arr[32*i +: 32];
  end
end

features.name: variable_part_select_with_cross_scope_reference
features.description: Code should include a dynamic slice operation (variable+:width) that references a loop variable from a different for loop's scope

features.name: duplicate_named_blocks_in_different_loops
features.description: Code should include two separate for loops with identical named blocks, where one loop's variable is accessed outside its scope
features.snippet:
for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) begin : lbl
  for (int j = 0; j < 2; j++) begin : lbl
    data = arr[8*i +: 8];
  end
end
